LeidenUniv.Tracking

Class TrackMaker_3D

  • java.lang.Object
    • LeidenUniv.Tracking.TrackMaker_3D
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ij.plugin.PlugIn

    public class TrackMaker_3D
extends java.lang.Object
implements ij.plugin.PlugIn

    • Constructor Detail

      • TrackMaker_3D

        public TrackMaker_3D(ij.ImagePlus imp,
                     boolean showMenu)
        Parameters:
        imp - The image to do the tracking on
        showMenu - To show the tracking settings.

      • TrackMaker_3D

        public TrackMaker_3D()

    • Method Detail

      • run

        public void run(java.lang.String arg)
        The main entry point for the plugin
        Specified by:
        run in interface ij.plugin.PlugIn
        Parameters:
        arg - is not used.

      • getImageDir

        public java.lang.String getImageDir()
        Returns:
        the imagedirectory, or the temp directory if no image directory is found

      • getTHist

        public double[][] getTHist(Track3D[] t3)
        Parameters:
        t3 - track3D array to analyze
        Returns:
        a histogram of all tracks lengths

      • filterTrackLength

        public Track3D[] filterTrackLength(Track3D[] t3,
                                   int minLength)
        Parameters:
        t3 - a track3D array
        minLength - the minimum length to work with
        Returns:
        a track3D array with the shorter elements removed

      • createAngleHeatMap

        public ij.ImagePlus createAngleHeatMap(Track3D[] cTracks)
        Parameters:
        cTracks - Track3D array to analyse
        Returns:
        Image containing all angle changes that occur in the tracks. To see if there is a preferred direction

      • createTrackHeatMap

        public ij.ImagePlus createTrackHeatMap(Track3D[] cTracks)
        Parameters:
        cTracks - Track3D array
        Returns:
        Image containing a heatmap of where the most tracks are seen. Each track adds 1 to the value of the pixel it passes

      • createTrackSpiderZ

        public ij.ImagePlus createTrackSpiderZ(Track3D[] cTracks)
        Parameters:
        cTracks - Track3D array to analyze
        Returns:
        XZimage where all tracks start in the center of the image. Only useful for 3D images

      • createTrackSpider

        public ij.ImagePlus createTrackSpider(Track3D[] cTracks)
        Parameters:
        cTracks - Track3D array
        Returns:
        Image where all start location have been moved to the center of the image

      • linkTracks

        public java.util.ArrayList<java.util.ArrayList<int[]>> linkTracks(java.util.ArrayList<java.util.ArrayList<int[]>> OT,
                                                                  java.util.ArrayList<mcib3d.geom.Objects3DPopulation> output)
        Parameters:
        OT - The tracks as created by the trackData method (not linked through time yet)
        output - The object 3D population to add onto
        Returns:
        The linked tracks, that are cured for gaps in time

      • getTHVs

        public double[][] getTHVs(Track3D[] Ta)
        Parameters:
        Ta - Track3D array
        Returns:
        total convex hull volumes

      • getCHVs

        public double[][] getCHVs(Track3D[] Ta,
                          int l)
        Parameters:
        Ta - Track3D array to analyze
        l - number of frames to take into accoung for the convex hull calculation
        Returns:
        local convex hull volumes

      • getHistData

        public void getHistData(double[][] Data,
                        boolean showData,
                        boolean saveData,
                        boolean averages,
                        java.lang.String type)
        Parameters:
        Data - which needs to be analysed for track lengths
        showData - whether or not to show
        saveData - whether or not to save
        averages - whether or not to calculate averages
        type - Name of the data used for naming the files and images

      • getData

        public void getData(double[][] Data,
                    boolean showData,
                    boolean saveData,
                    boolean averages,
                    java.lang.String type)
        Parameters:
        Data - Double array that needs to be calculated/saved/shown
        showData - whether or not to show
        saveData - whether or not to save
        averages - whether or not to calculate averages
        type - Name of the data used for naming the files and images

      • getSteps

        public void getSteps(Track3D[] Ta)
        Parameters:
        Ta - Track3D array to analyze

      • getTrackData

        public void getTrackData(Track3D[] Ta,
                         boolean showData,
                         boolean saveData)
        Parameters:
        Ta - Track3d array to analyse
        showData - Whether or not to show the data
        saveData - Whether or not to save the data

      • getMSDdata

        public void getMSDdata(double[][] MSDs,
                       boolean showData,
                       boolean saveData,
                       boolean averages)
        Parameters:
        MSDs - The MSD data acquired through getMSDs
        showData - show data or not
        saveData - show graph or not
        averages - calculate averages or not

      • getMSDs

        public double[][] getMSDs(Track3D[] Ta)
        Parameters:
        Ta - Track3D array
        Returns:
        Mean squared displacement data per track

      • Menu

        public static boolean Menu(boolean showMenu)
        Parameters:
        showMenu - whether to show the menu or not
        Returns:
        if settings are succesfully saved

      • AnalyzeTracks

        public ij.ImagePlus AnalyzeTracks(java.util.ArrayList<java.util.ArrayList<int[]>> Tracks,
                                  ij.ImagePlus tmp,
                                  java.util.ArrayList<mcib3d.geom.Objects3DPopulation> output)
        Parameters:
        Tracks - The "cured" tracks or if needed the raw tracks can be analysed here
        tmp - A temporary image to work with, a duplicate of the first frame of original image
        output - The 3D objects as originally detected
        Returns:
        Image with the 3D tracks

      • trackData

        public java.util.ArrayList<java.util.ArrayList<int[]>> trackData(java.util.ArrayList<mcib3d.geom.Objects3DPopulation> al)
        Parameters:
        al - The 3D objects to track
        Returns:
        the linked tracks organised by frame, and the number of objects. Marking frame number and object number that belong together

      • getDots

        public java.util.ArrayList<mcib3d.geom.Objects3DPopulation> getDots(ij.ImagePlus In)
        Parameters:
        In - The imageplus to analyze
        Returns:
        the Objects3Dpopulation containing all detected objects
